_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved. All work above ELV (50V AC / 120V DC ripple-free) must be performed by a licensed electrician per AS/NZS 3000.

hazards.title: Electric shock — energised cabling
hazards.risk: Contact with energised wiring during work, especially in damp / wet ground

controls.title: All circuits isolated, LOTO before work
Licensed electrician for any work above ELV

hazards.title: Strike of buried cable
hazards.risk: Garden bed digging hitting existing buried cable

controls.title: BYDA + on-site scan; hand-dig where existing cables suspected

tasks: Pre-start: licensed electrician on site; confirm licence + current.
Confirm switchboard isolation point; apply LOTO.
BYDA + on-site scan before any garden digging.
Trench cable runs (typically 300mm depth; 450mm under driveways) with warning tape.
Lay conduit + cable per AS/NZS 3000; ELV runs separated from mains where required.
Install fittings per manufacturer; IP-rated for location.
Test continuity, insulation resistance, RCD trip.
Electrician issues Electrical Safety Certificate of Compliance; upload to Hub.
